stemHtml: The Commercial Air Transport flight shall be conducted so that the expected usable remaining fuel on arrival at the destination aerodrome is NOT less than the sum of the…

options.a: Alternate Fuel and the Final Reserve Fuel.
options.b: Alternate Fuel, Contingency Fuel and the Final Reserve Fuel.
options.c: Alternate Fuel and the Contingency Fuel.
options.d: Contingency Fuel and the Final Reserve Fuel.
